hero.label: Our Story
hero.title: About Us
hero.subtitle: A family business with deep roots in Greek soil.

story.label: Since 1990
story.title: Our story starts in the mountains
story.para1: Rizos started as a small family cheese-making unit in Epirus. With respect for traditional recipes and love for nature, we created products that stand out.
story.para2: Today, three generations later, we continue with the same passion — bringing the purest dairy products to your table.

items.title: 1990 — The Beginning
items.description: Establishment of the first production unit in Epirus. Starting with feta and yogurt.

items.title: 2005 — Expansion
items.description: New facilities, new products. Our range grows with kasseri, kefalotyri and anthotyro.

items.title: 2015 — Certifications
items.description: We obtain ISO 22000 and HACCP certifications. Exports to 5 countries.

items.title: Today
items.description: 50+ products, 1000+ customers and the same love for quality from day one.

hero.label: Contact
hero.title: Get in Touch
hero.subtitle: We are here for any questions, orders or partnership proposals.

hero.label: Facilities
hero.title: Our Facilities
hero.subtitle: Modern production spaces with respect for tradition and the environment.

overview.label: Production
overview.title: From milk to finished product
overview.para1: Our unit is located in the heart of Epirus, close to the livestock farmers who supply us with fresh milk daily. Every production stage is strictly controlled.
overview.para2: We combine traditional techniques with modern equipment to ensure top quality in every batch.

items.title: Certifications
items.description: Certified unit according to ISO 22000 and HACCP. We adhere to the strictest food safety standards.

items.title: Environmental Responsibility
items.description: Waste minimization, water recycling and use of renewable energy sources in our facilities.

items.title: Laboratory Testing
items.description: In-house quality control laboratory. Every batch is tested before reaching the shelf.

items.title: Experienced Staff
items.description: Cheesemakers with decades of experience who pour their craft into our products.

hero.label: Our Products
hero.title: Traditional Feta
hero.subtitle: Authentic feta from free-range milk, aged in wooden barrels.

overview.label: The Original
overview.title: A cheese with history
overview.para1: Our Traditional Feta is made from fresh free-range sheep and goat milk, sourced directly from local herders in the mountains of Epirus. Each batch is aged slowly in wooden barrels, allowing the flavors to develop naturally.
overview.para2: The barrel-aging process gives our feta its characteristic rich aroma, crumbly yet creamy texture, and the tangy depth that has made it a staple of Greek cuisine for centuries.

items.title: Barrel-Aged
items.description: Slowly matured in wooden barrels for a deeper, more complex flavor profile.

items.title: Free-Range Milk
items.description: Made exclusively from milk of sheep and goats grazing freely in the Epirus mountains.

items.title: No Preservatives
items.description: Only milk, rennet, and salt — nothing else. Pure and natural as tradition demands.

items.title: PDO Certified
items.description: Produced in Epirus according to the strict standards of the Protected Designation of Origin.

cta.title: Want to try our Traditional Feta?
cta.subtitle: Contact us for wholesale or retail orders.

hero.label: Our Products
hero.title: Leuko Turi
hero.subtitle: A traditional white brined cheese with a smooth, creamy texture and mild salty flavor.

overview.label: Smooth & Mild
overview.title: The everyday white cheese
overview.para1: Leuko Turi is a traditional white cheese aged in brine, with a silky-smooth texture and a gentle, balanced saltiness. It's the cheese that graces every Greek table — from a simple breakfast to a festive spread.
overview.para2: Carefully crafted from fresh free-range milk, it pairs perfectly with olive oil, tomatoes, and warm bread. A versatile favorite that brings people together.

items.title: Creamy Texture
items.description: Silky-smooth and spreadable, perfect for salads, sandwiches, or enjoying on its own.

items.title: Mild Flavor
items.description: A gentle, balanced saltiness that makes it approachable and delicious for every palate.

items.title: Versatile
items.description: From breakfast to dinner, in salads, pastries, or straight from the brine — always a perfect fit.

items.title: Fresh Ingredients
items.description: Made daily from fresh free-range milk with no artificial additives or preservatives.

cta.title: Want to try Leuko Turi?
cta.subtitle: Contact us for wholesale or retail orders.
